description: Shared schemas compile with no TypeScript errors
Shared package builds successfully
steps: Run cd shared && npm run build

description: Zod schemas export all required types
steps: Check shared/src/index.ts exports schemas and types

description: CDK stack synthesizes successfully
steps: Run cd infrastructure && npx cdk synth

description: CDK tests pass - DynamoDB table configuration
steps: Verify table has correct key schema and GSIs

description: CDK tests pass - Lambda function configuration
steps: Verify Lambda has Node.js 20 runtime and TABLE_NAME env var

description: CDK tests pass - API Gateway configuration
steps: Verify HTTP API has CORS and 5 routes

description: CDK tests pass - S3 and CloudFront configuration
steps: Verify S3 bucket and CloudFront distribution

description: CDK tests pass - Stack outputs
steps: Verify ApiUrl, FrontendBucketName, CloudFrontUrl, TableName, DistributionId outputs

description: Backend TypeScript compiles with no errors
API GET /announcements returns list of announcements
steps: Verify response has announcements array and nextToken

description: API GET /announcements?service=Lambda filters by service
steps: Verify all returned items have service=Lambda

description: API GET /announcements/:id returns single announcement
steps: Verify response has all announcement fields

description: API POST /announcements creates a new announcement
API PUT /announcements/:id updates an announcement
API DELETE /announcements/:id deletes an announcement
API returns 404 for non-existent announcement
API returns 400 for invalid create input
DynamoDB table has seeded data
API search returns filtered results
Frontend builds successfully with Vite
steps: Run cd frontend && npm run build

description: Homepage loads and shows header with AWS News Hub
Homepage shows filter bar with service categories
steps: Verify filter buttons are visible (All, Lambda, S3, etc.)

description: Homepage shows search bar
Homepage shows announcement cards when API is available
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:6174 with API connected

description: Clicking a filter button updates the feed
Search bar filters announcements with debounce
Clicking announcement card navigates to detail page
Announcement detail page shows full content
steps: Verify title, date, service badge, and summary

description: Detail page has Edit and Delete buttons
steps: Verify Edit and Delete buttons are present

description: Create announcement page renders form
steps: Verify form with title, service, date, summary, link fields

description: Create form validates required fields
Create form submits and redirects on success
Edit page pre-populates form with existing data
Edit form saves changes and redirects
Delete confirmation dialog appears on delete click
Delete removes announcement and redirects
steps: Verify redirect to home and item removed

description: Mobile responsive layout works
Navigation works between all pages
404 page shows for invalid announcement ID
Homepage has polished layout with proper spacing
steps: Verify clean layout, proper padding, card spacing

description: Typography uses custom fonts (Space Grotesk, Crimson Pro, JetBrains Mono)
Service badges have distinct colors per service
Cards have hover effects and transitions
Header has proper dark background with orange accent
Loading state shows skeleton shimmer animation
Form inputs have focus ring and error states
steps: Submit invalid to see error state

description: Entry animations play on page load (staggered fade-in)
Empty state shows helpful message with icon
Footer is properly styled at bottom of page
steps: Verify footer with copyright and tech stack
